gold_change_reason: Added multi-tumor parsing (D-axis) and validation of tumor fraction count against C and p* groups (C-axis).
covered_requirements: Scaled executable cases must test single and multi-tumor inputs.
Add constraint that validates the number of tumor fractions matches the number of copy number and probability groups, raising errors on mismatch.
Scaled executable cases must include at least one case that triggers the validation error.
implementation_notes: Parses C and p* by splitting on ':' to get groups, then within groups split by ','. For single tumor, groups are flattened into a single inner list; for multi-tumor, transposed to per-tumor lists.
Validates that each group in C and p* has length equal to the number of tumor fractions (len(mu_tumors)). Raises ValueError on mismatch.
Handles None placeholders for non-numeric entries (digits for C, alphabetic for p*).
assumptions: Input file has exactly one data line after header.
